name: Maker sDAI — DSR Savings
description: Deposit DAI into the Dai Savings Rate via sDAI (ERC-4626 vault). Earns the protocol-set DSR (currently ~5-8% APR) with zero smart-contract complexity beyond an ERC-4626 deposit.
use_case: Agent has 25k DAI sitting idle. Deposits via sDAI vault → earns DSR (~6% APR) with no liquidation risk, no impermanent loss, fully redeemable at any block. Pure savings rate from MakerDAO treasury.

verification.criteria: Tx target is sDAI, function deposit, receiver == agent. Post-tx sDAI.balanceOf(agent) increased; the share amount matches convertToShares(assets) within rounding.
